positive: A mystical, stylized golden compass set against a minimalist, solid dark navy background. The compass points are rendered as elegant, abstract constellations and glowing geometric lines, symbolizing exploration and fate. Incorporate subtle celestial elements like crescent moons and stylized planetary rings that orbit the central compass design. The overall style should be clean, line-art heavy, and geometrically precise, resembling modern tribal tattoo flash or sophisticated occult sigils. Utilize strong, metallic gold etching effects contrasting sharply with the deep matte navy blue background. Composition should be perfectly centered and highly detailed, optimized for single-color spot printing feel but rendered with photorealistic depth and material richness. Highly scalable, high contrast, clean silhouette, symmetrical.
negative: blurry, noise, jpeg artifacts, text, words, watermark, signature, logo, dirty, messy, complex background, gradient background, poor composition, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail
